history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, messy hair is captured in a medium shot, looking off to the right with a pensive expression. He's wearing a grey zip-up hoodie over a white t-shirt and a silver chain with a round, dark blue pendant. A green-strapped watch is visible on his left wrist. His right hand is resting on his chin, with his fingers gently touching his cheek. Behind him, large, bright yellow 3D letters spelling out "JOHN" are mounted on a cream-colored wall. The lighting is soft and warm, casting subtle shadows and highlighting the textures of the hoodie and the letters. The overall mood is casual and thoughtful, with a slightly minimalist aesthetic. The color palette is dominated by neutral tones of grey, cream, and white, with pops of yellow from the lettering and green from the watch strap.
